parameters.content:
### WF-BILLING-FLEET-AGGREGATE

Hourly fleet aggregation for SM Platform Billing.
Populates one record per active SM Site Registry entry.

Self-Serve path: Stripe Subscription + Invoices.
Managed Account path: ERPNext Sales Invoices.

churn_risk_score is stubbed at 0 (future AI phase).
last_usage_review, upsell_candidate, notes: not set by this workflow.

meta.description: Hourly fleet aggregation for SM Platform Billing. Populates one record per active SM Site Registry entry from Stripe (Self-Serve) and ERPNext (Managed Account) signals. Triggered at :00 every hour.
